title: Silky Floral Saudi Lamb Salad
description: A vibrant, Whole30‑friendly lamb salad bursting with dill pickles, fermented notes, and a silky tahini‑lemon dressing that showcases Saudi Arabian flavors.

ingredients.name: dill pickles
ingredients.notes: cucumbers pickled with dill, no sugar

instructions: Marinate the lamb slices with smoked paprika, cumin, coriander, minced garlic, salt, pepper, and 1 tbsp olive oil for 20 minutes.
While the lamb marinates, toss the diced cucumber, sliced red onion, chopped mint, parsley, and dill pickles in a bowl.
In a small bowl whisk together tahini, lemon juice, apple cider vinegar, and the remaining 1 tbsp olive oil until silky smooth.
Heat a non‑stick skillet over medium‑high heat and sear the lamb slices for 2–3 minutes per side until nicely browned and cooked through.
Transfer the lamb to a serving platter and arrange the cucumber‑pickle mixture around it.
Drizzle the silky tahini dressing over the lamb and vegetables.
Garnish with extra mint leaves and a sprinkle of fresh dill.
Serve immediately, letting diners mix the dressing into the salad for a harmonious blend of flavors.
Enjoy the fragrant, silky texture and the subtle fermented tang that pays homage to Saudi culinary tradition.
